libretube.name: LibreTube
libretube.description: Alternative YouTube frontend for Android, privacy-respecting, no ads.

newpipe.name: NewPipe
newpipe.description: Lightweight YouTube frontend, supports background playback and downloads.

grayjay.name: Grayjay
grayjay.description: Multi-platform media frontend (YouTube, Twitch, podcasts). Local-first and privacy-focused.

fdroid.name: F-Droid
fdroid.description: Open-source Android app repository, discover libre apps easily.

vanced.name: Vanced MicroG
vanced.description: Required MicroG support for Vanced YouTube to run on Android.

aurora_store.name: Aurora Store
aurora_store.description: Anonymous Play Store client. Download Google Play apps without Google account.

island.name: Island
island.description: App sandboxing tool using Android Work Profile isolation.

tracker_control.name: TrackerControl
tracker_control.description: Monitors and blocks trackers in installed apps without root.

netguard.name: NetGuard
netguard.description: No-root firewall for per-app network blocking.

bloktada.name: Blokada
bloktada.description: System-wide ad and tracker blocker using local VPN.

aegis.name: Aegis Authenticator
aegis.description: Secure open-source 2FA app with encryption and biometrics.
